info.name: CMS - Consignment Management System
info.description: Setup: 1) Set baseUrl=http://localhost:8080  2) Run Login first — token auto-saved

variable.description: suppliers | contracts | companies | stores | customers | reasons

response.name: 400 Invalid Status
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"Only CSRQ with status HELD can be released"}

response.name: 400 Setup not found
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"CSO items are not registered for supplier/contract/store"}

response.name: 400 Invalid Status
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"Only CSO with status HELD can be released"}

response.name: 400 CSO not RELEASED
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"CSDO can only be transferred from CSO with status RELEASED"}

response.name: 400 Not RELEASED
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"Actual quantity can only be updated when CSR is RELEASED"}

response.name: 400 Not RELEASED
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"Only CSR with status RELEASED can be completed"}

response.name: 400 Not HELD
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"Settlement details can only be posted when status is HELD"}

response.name: 400 No documents
response.body: {"error":"BUSINESS_RULE_VIOLATION","message":"No eligible source documents found for the requested period"}
